netflix.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain
netflix.overview: This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

amazon-prime-video.title: Eli Manning Presents: The Undercovers - Sabrina Ionescu
amazon-prime-video.overview: Eli Manning recruits WNBA superstar Sabrina Ionescu to go undercover at her alma mater, the University of Oregon. Sabrina transforms into Jennifer Scone, an enthusiastic Ducks fan who's attending her first basketball game. She fools coaches, mingles with fans, and shocks the crowd at halftime.

apple-tv.title: Lucky
apple-tv.overview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

disney-plus.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland
disney-plus.overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.

skyshowtime.title: The Odyssey: The Making of an Epic
skyshowtime.overview: Go behind the scenes of Christopher Nolan's mythic action epic, The Odyssey. This special documentary explores the monumental undertaking of adapting Homer’s foundational saga for the big screen, charting a grueling 91-day principal photography schedule across six countries. From the revolutionary use of brand-new IMAX film technology to the massive coordination of over 5,300 custom-designed costumes, discover how a star-studded cast led by Matt Damon, Tom Holland, and Anne Hathaway brought the dangerous, timeless world of ancient Greek gods and monsters to life.

hbo-max.title: The Welcome Table
hbo-max.overview: Tells the story of climate refugees across six continents, celebrating the voices and experiences of people living at the forefront of the climate crisis, displaced from their homes by climate disasters.
